query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img1 FROM reviews WHERE analysisJson IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[0].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img0, JSON_EXTRACT(analysisJson, '$.improvements[1].shoppingLinks[0].imageUrl') AS img1 FROM reviews WHERE analysisJson IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
